title: Mini — component manifest
description: Inventory of every component in the project, read by check-component-reuse, enforce-tokens, and propagate-language-update. See Mini plan §9.2 and naming-conventions.md §4.

name.description: PascalCase component name. Matches the default export or declared React/Swift component.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the component file (e.g., 'src/components/PrimaryButton.tsx').

purpose.description: One-sentence description of what this component is for. Read by check-component-reuse.

status.description: managed = under Mini's rules; legacy = grandfathered brownfield; excluded = Mini ignores.

native_wrapped.description: True if this component wraps a platform-native archetype (Radix on web, SwiftUI native on Swift). Read by check-component-reuse step 0.

archetypes_used.description: Archetype contract names from core/archetypes.md that this component wraps or composes.

tokens_referenced.description: Flat list of design-language token names (e.g., 'space-3', 'accent-9', 'radius-button').

variants.description: Named variants or states this component exposes.

css_prefix.description: BEM-style class prefix (or space-separated list) the component owns. Tells AI generators and reviewers which selectors belong to this component when grepping CSS.
